arts.ttl: OGC Nice predicted XI v Reims: Franck Haise’s defensive options limited
arts.sum: OGC Nice’s defensive options are limited as they prepare to host Stade de Reims at the Allianz Riviera. The club are reeling after two major injuries in the space of…

Nice claimed a huge 3-1 win at champions PSG last week to extend their unbeaten run to three matches, and claim a second successive league victory. A win on Friday night would see them move up to thir...
